name: Media Atlas

releases.author: gregeld96
releases.description:
Initial release of Media Atlas.

Features:
- Gallery View for vault images.
- Fast search and filtering.
- Native Drag & Drop support to notes.
- Support for PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, and SVG.
releases.name: Release 1.0.0
